text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Unity Cup is split between the preseason and
the finals. Our first order of business will be to
place high in the preseason races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moreover, the Unity Cup is a team-based
competition—in order to compete at all, I'll need
to form a team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can get Umamusume interested in joining my
team by reaching out to racers who have
supported me or by doing well in the preseason
matches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll also need to think up a team name. Thanks to
Tazuna's encouragement, I feel fired up and more
than ready to take on the challenge ahead!
